nodes.name: St. Lawrence Market
nodes.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.
nodes.premise: POI: St. Lawrence Market - Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.

nodes.name: CN Tower
nodes.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.
nodes.premise: POI: CN Tower - Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.
nodes.premise: POI: Art Gallery of Ontario - Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.
nodes.premise: POI: Royal Ontario Museum - World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

nodes.name: Casa Loma
nodes.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.
nodes.premise: POI: Casa Loma - Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

nodes.name: Rivoli
nodes.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.
nodes.premise: POI: Rivoli - Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.

nodes.name: Toronto Islands
nodes.description: Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.
nodes.premise: POI: Toronto Islands - Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.

nodes.name: Distillery District
nodes.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.
nodes.premise: POI: Distillery District - Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.

nodes.name: High Park
nodes.description: Toronto's largest public park featuring hiking trails, a zoo, and cherry blossoms in spring.
nodes.premise: POI: High Park - Toronto's largest public park featuring hiking trails, a zoo, and cherry blossoms in spring.

nodes.name: Graffiti Alley
nodes.description: Vibrant street art corridor in the Fashion District showcasing local and international artists.
nodes.premise: POI: Graffiti Alley - Vibrant street art corridor in the Fashion District showcasing local and international artists.

nodes.name: Spadina Museum
nodes.description: Historic house museum showcasing early 20th-century Toronto life with period furnishings.
nodes.premise: POI: Spadina Museum - Historic house museum showcasing early 20th-century Toronto life with period furnishings.

nodes.name: Nathan Phillips Square
nodes.description: Iconic city square featuring the Toronto sign, reflecting pool, and evening atmosphere.
nodes.premise: POI: Nathan Phillips Square - Iconic city square featuring the Toronto sign, reflecting pool, and evening atmosphere.

nodes.name: Harbourfront Centre
nodes.description: Waterfront cultural hub with galleries, performances, and lake views.
nodes.premise: POI: Harbourfront Centre - Waterfront cultural hub with galleries, performances, and lake views.

nodes.name: Hockey Hall of Fame
nodes.description: Shrine to Canada's national sport with Stanley Cup, memorabilia, and interactive exhibits.
nodes.premise: POI: Hockey Hall of Fame - Shrine to Canada's national sport with Stanley Cup, memorabilia, and interactive exhibits.

nodes.name: Eaton Centre
nodes.description: Iconic downtown shopping mall with flagship stores and stunning architecture.
nodes.premise: POI: Eaton Centre - Iconic downtown shopping mall with flagship stores and stunning architecture.
